---
title: "Discrete with extinction"
author: "Caleb"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document: default
  pdf_document: default
editor_options: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
---

## Load trees


```{r}

library(treats)
bd_params <- make.bd.params(speciation = 0.1, extinction = 0.07)

stop_rule <- list(max.living = 50)
set.seed(123)

mass_extinction <- make.events(
                      target       = "taxa",
                      condition    = age.condition(6),
                      modification = random.extinction(0.9))

trees <- treats(stop.rule = stop_rule, bd.params = bd_params, null.error = 100, replicates = 20, events = mass_extinction)
trees <- lapply(trees, drop.singles)
write.tree(trees, "../Data/trees/randomextinction.tre")

# trees <- read.tree("../Data/trees/simulated.tre")

slow_pre_transitions <- matrix(c(
    0.99, 0.0099, 0.0001,    # From state 0: 99% stay, 0.99% to state 1, 0.01% to state 2
    0.0099, 0.99, 0.0001,    # From state 1: 0.99% to state 0, 99% stay, 0.01% to state 2
    0.025, 0.025, 0.95       # From state 2: can exit back to 0 or 1, or stay
), nrow = 3, byrow = TRUE)

slow_post_transitions <- matrix(c(
    0.97, 0.01, 0.02,      # From state 0: prefer staying, but some transition to 1 and 2
    0.005, 0.985, 0.01,   # From state 1: very rarely go to 0, mostly stay, some to 2
    0.005, 0.02, 0.975    # From state 2: very rarely go to 0, some to 1, mostly stay
), nrow = 3, byrow = TRUE)

slow_pre <- treats::make.traits(process = discrete.process, n = 100, process.args = list(transitions = slow_pre_transitions))
slow_post <- treats::make.traits(process = discrete.process, n = 100, process.args = list(transitions = slow_post_transitions))



med_binary_transitions <- matrix(c(
  0.90, 0.1,
  0.1, 0.9
), nrow = 2, byrow = TRUE)


med_multi_transitions <- matrix(c(
  0.9, 0.05, 0.05,
  0.05, 0.9, 0.05,
  0.05, 0.05, 0.9
), nrow = 3, byrow = TRUE)

med_binary <- treats::make.traits(process = discrete.process, n = 85, process.args = list(transitions = med_binary_transitions))
med_multi <- treats::make.traits(process = discrete.process, n = 15, process.args = list(transitions = med_multi_transitions))

fast_binary_transitions <- matrix(c(
    0.1, 0.9,
    0.9, 0.1
), nrow = 2, byrow = TRUE)

fast_multi_transitions <- matrix(c(
    0.1, 0.45, 0.45, 
    0.45, 0.1, 0.45,
    0.45, 0.45, 0.1 
), nrow = 3, byrow = TRUE)

fast_binary <- treats::make.traits(process = discrete.process, n = 85, process.args = list(transitions = fast_binary_transitions))
fast_multi <- treats::make.traits(process = discrete.process, n = 15, process.args = list(transitions = fast_multi_transitions))

selective_extinction <- make.events(target = "traits", condition = age.condition(4), modification = traits.update(process = discrete.process, process.args = list(transitions = slow_post_transitions)))

## map the traits



slow_matrices <- lapply(trees, function(tree) {
    mapped_binary <- (map.traits(slow_binary, tree, events = ))$data
    mapped_multi <- (map.traits(slow_multi, tree))$data
    matrix <- cbind(mapped_binary, mapped_multi)
    return(matrix)
})

med_matrices <- lapply(trees, function(tree) {
    mapped_binary <- (map.traits(med_binary, tree))$data
    mapped_multi <- (map.traits(med_multi, tree))$data
    matrix <- cbind(mapped_binary, mapped_multi)
    return(matrix)
})

fast_matrices <- lapply(trees, function(tree) {
    mapped_binary <- (map.traits(fast_binary, tree))$data
    mapped_multi <- (map.traits(fast_multi, tree))$data
    matrix <- cbind(mapped_binary, mapped_multi)
    return(matrix)
})


discrete_matrices <- list(slow = slow_matrices, med = med_matrices, fast = fast_matrices)
saveRDS(discrete_matrices, "../Data/matrices/discretematrices.rds")
discrete_matrices <- readRDS("../Data/matrices/discretematrices.rds")


```
